data.name: LoginHeroTitle
data.value: Sign in to your document knowledge workspace.

data.name: LoginHeroText
data.value: Use your configured identity provider to reach the tenants, workspaces and projects assigned to your account.

data.name: SignupHeroText
data.value: Harpyx supports self-registration when enabled by the instance operator: otherwise, access is granted through invitations or administrator-managed accounts.

data.name: BenefitDocumentsText
data.value: Upload files and links into project knowledge bases.

data.name: BenefitTeamsText
data.value: Keep work separated through tenants and permissions.

data.name: BenefitOpenText
data.value: Run open-source Harpyx in the environment you trust.

data.name: LoginCardText
data.value: Choose one of the authentication providers enabled for this Harpyx instance.

data.name: SignupCardText
data.value: Use the provider associated with the email address you want to use in Harpyx.

data.name: LoginPolicyNote
data.value: If your account has not been activated yet, Harpyx will stop the login flow and show the proper access message.

data.name: SignupPolicyNote
data.value: Account creation depends on the instance policy. Some installations allow open self-registration; others require an invitation from an administrator.
